title: SUMMER TRAINING PROGRAM
content: SUMMER TRAINING PROGRAM DEPARTMENT OF CIVIL ENGINEERING JAYPEE UNIVERSITY OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY WAKNAGHAT, SOLAN, H.P. -173234 SUMMER TRAINING PROGRAM, 1st JUNE – 15th JULY 2026 The Department of Civil Engineering at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, Himachal Pradesh, offers a Summer School on Advanced Civil Engineering Practices and Computational Tools Summer Training Program for Diploma and B.Tech students, with durations of 4 or 6 weeks (Blended Mode) during June–July 2026, in various domains of Civil Engineering. ABOUT THE DEPARTMENT: The Department of Civil Engineering (CED) at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT) provides a dynamic and industry-oriented learning environment for aspiring civil engineers. The department offers a B.Tech. in Civil Engineering along with M. Tech. specializations in Structural Engineering, Construction Management, and Environmental Engineering and a Ph.D. program focused on advanced research., designed to impart both theoretical knowledge and hands-on practical skills. The curriculum is carefully structured to integrate fundamental engineering principles with modern technological advancements; ensuring students are well-prepared to tackle real-world challenges. The department is committed to academic excellence, research, and innovation, focusing on emerging fields such as smart infrastructure, disaster-resilient construction, geotechnical investigations, and sustainable development. CED is equipped with state-of-the-art laboratories for Concrete Technology, Structural Engineering, Geotechnical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Highway Engineering, Hydraulic Engineering and Surveying, along with facilities for Engineering Graphics and Workshop Practices. These well-equipped labs provide students with extensive hands-on experience, allowing them to apply theoretical concepts to practical applications. The department also emphasizes software training in STAAD Pro, AutoCAD, MATLAB, Revit, MS-Project, Primavera, ETABS, ANSYS etc. enhancing students’ technical proficiency and employability. To bridge the gap between academia and industry, students undergo practical training and internships with top construction companies like Larsen & Toubro, NHAI, Jayprakash associates, Simplex, IOCL, NTPC, DMRC etc. gaining invaluable industry exposure. CED ensures that students are well-prepared for both public and private sector employment by offering internships, site visits, and collaborative industry projects. Graduates from the department have secured placements in leading private and public companies such as HPPWD, HPPCL, SJVNL, Jaypee group, JSW, SP Singla etc. SUMMER TRAINING APPLICATION PROCEDURE: Fill the Online Application Form (https://forms.gle/8SudsU5eNizWPUYS6) with personal details and a recent photograph. (Please do not send any hard copies.) Confirmation of your application will be sent within 10 days of receipt. Last date to apply: 20th May 2026 The training fee must be submitted via Online Mode (RTGS/NEFT) only. Other modes of payment will not be accepted. The applicant must confirm the payment by sending the transaction receipt and details for module allotment. Applications without payment confirmation by 20th May 2026 will be rejected. Training modules will be allotted on a First-Come, First-Served (FCFS) basis. Each module will have a maximum of 20 seats. Modules with fewer than 5 participants will be cancelled, and students will be moved to their second preference. An email will be sent to notify registered candidates. DOCUMENTS REQUIRED AT THE TIME OF REGISTRATION (ON ARRIVAL AT JUIT): Latest CV/Resume Three passport-size photographs (for ID card, laundry card, registration form, etc.) SUMMER TRAINING CHARGES: Fee Category 4 weeks 6 Weeks Training Fee without Hostel Rs 1000/- Rs 1000/- Training Fee with Hostel Rs 1000/- + Rs 16000/- = Rs 17000/- Rs 1000/- + Rs 24000/- = Rs 25000/- • Hostel Fee includes lodging and meals (breakfast, lunch, and dinner). • Training Fee covers consumables required during the program. • PG/private hostels or shared accommodations are available around JUIT. Organizers may assist students who opt not to stay in the university hostel. • Students are advised to keep a screenshot of the payment receipt. FEE REFUND POLICY: • Training Fee is non-refundable, as consumables such as kits, chemicals, and media will be pre-purchased. Ensure your availability before applying and submitting the fee. • Hostel Fee may be refunded on request in case of genuine/unavoidable reasons leading to withdrawal. AVAILABLE TRAINING MODULES and FACUTY COORDINATORS: S.No Training Module Faculty Assigned Contact Program Structure (Blended Mode) 1 Summer School on Computer-Aided Structural Analysis and Drafting (STAAD Pro and AutoCAD) Dr. Saurav & Dr. Tanmay Gupta 01792-239388 Mob: 9625229857 saurav@juitsolan.in; 4 Weeks: 3 Weeks Offline + 1 Week Online (Assignments, Case Studies & Capstone Project) 6 Weeks: 4 Weeks Offline + 2 Weeks Online (Advanced Modules, Project Work & Capstone Project) 2 Summer School on Surveying Techniques and Computational Methods Dr. Ashish Kumar and Dr. Kaushal Kumar 01792-239229 Mob: 9805884286 ashish.fce@juitsolan.in, 3 Summer School on Integrated Geotechnical and Transportation Engineering Dr. Amardeep, Dr. Niraj Singh Parihar & Dr. A. K. Gupta 01792-239398 Mob: 7018896627 amardeep@juitsolan.in NEARBY TOURIST ATTRACTIONS: The JUIT campus is located 3 km off NH-22 (Ambala–Kalka–Waknaghat–Shimla Road) and is a 30-minute drive from Shimla. Tourist attractions nearby include: • Shimla (24 km) • Chail (45 km) • Kufri (45 km) • Kasauli (50 km) JUIT is consistently ranked among the most beautiful university campuses in India. India Mobile: +91-9625229857 | Office: 01792-239388 | Email: saurav@juit.ac.in , saurav@juitsolan.in
